projects.name: MRT Line-5 Northern Route
projects.subtitle: Geotechnical FEA
projects.scope: Geotechnical risk quantification for TBM-induced ground movement on MRT Line-5 Northern Route alignment. Static, dynamic, and liquefaction analysis of the urban soil profile.
technicalDetails: PLAXIS 3D FEA calibrated from field borehole data
Constitutive models: HS-Small (clayey soils), UBC3D-PLM (loose sand / liquefaction), Norsand (dense sand / dilatancy)
Dynamic TBM loading cycles: vibration propagation profiles, static settlement contours, cumulative residual settlement
Liquefaction screening on susceptible strata within influence zone
Defined safe TBM operation corridors replacing conservative blanket exclusion zones

projects.name: Ulukhola Factory Oversight Villa
projects.subtitle: BIM Consultancy
projects.scope: Architectural BIM consultancy and full coordination for a factory oversight villa. 7D BIM modeling, architectural drawing production, site visualization.

projects.name: Devdaru Residential Complex
projects.subtitle: High-Rise Structural Design
projects.scope: Full structural design of 15-storey residential complex. Dual system (SMRF + RC shear wall), seismic and gravity load design.

projects.name: Bosudha Supermarket
projects.subtitle: Architectural Design
projects.scope: Comprehensive architectural design — floor plans, site plans, elevations, facade, and shade structures.

projects.name: Radiant Complex
projects.subtitle: Seismic Structural Design
projects.scope: Full structural analysis and design. IMRF system, SDC-C seismic zone, P-Delta and soft-story checks.

projects.name: Project Skymart
projects.subtitle: Commercial Development Design
projects.program: Supermarket, Food Court, Cinema Hall, Gym, Kids' Zone
projects.scope: Large-scale commercial development with metro station connection. Comprehensive floor plans, site planning, space programming, and architectural visualization.
